notes: Live-captured top-level Event read against harry-test-heelo.myshopify.com. The capture script discovers a real event ID from events(first: 1, sortKey: ID, reverse: true), then records event(id:), a non-empty events connection, and eventsCount without a query filter. This scenario proves live-hybrid events roots must read through to Shopify instead of using the snapshot no-data serializer for stores with events.
